desc: Swakopmund is Namibia's adventure capital where Atlantic fog meets desert dunes, ideal for self-drive itineraries and activity-focused stays.
hls: Sandboarding, quad biking, and desert excursions
Gateway to Walvis Bay marine tours
Cooler coastal climate than inland Namibia

todo.name: Living Desert tour
todo.desc: Take a guided dune ecology drive for endemic desert wildlife.

todo.name: Walvis Bay catamaran cruise
todo.desc: Look for dolphins, seals, and birdlife in the lagoon.

todo.name: Dune 7 adventure session
todo.desc: Try sandboarding or quad biking on major dune fields.

todo.name: Swakopmund Mole walk
todo.desc: Stroll the waterfront and old jetty area at sunset.

todo.name: German-Namibian bakery crawl
todo.desc: Sample local pastries, game dishes, and coastal seafood.

wifi.note: Stable in central hotels; weaker in desert-edge lodges.

prac.fltNote: UK/Ireland access usually requires one stop to Windhoek or Cape Town/Johannesburg plus a domestic hop or long drive; Namibian peak season (Jun-Oct) increases car-rental and flight demand.
prac.currency: Namibia local currency (check live rates before booking).
prac.lang: Local language plus tourism-level English in main visitor areas.
prac.tz: Check local timezone and DST rules for exact travel dates.
prac.visa: Confirm current entry/transit rules for your passport before booking.
alerts: Atlantic fog can reduce visibility on the B2 and C34 roads, especially mornings.
Desert activities are weather-dependent and may cancel in high-wind conditions.
Fuel and services thin out quickly outside town—self-drive with conservative range planning.

sweet: May-Oct for cooler desert touring and lower rain risk.
